title: Hornet Removal in Edison, NJ | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Edison, NJ starting at $350. Fast, safe hornet nest elimination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts serving Edison and surrounding areas.
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Edison residents and businesses, especially during the warmer months when these aggressive insects build large nests in eaves, trees, and building exteriors. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Edison, from the historic Menlo Park area to Route 1 commercial districts. Our trained technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations, protecting your family, employees, and customers.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Edison and the greater New Jersey area with safe, effective hornet removal solutions. Our licensed technicians use proven methods and professional-grade equipment to eliminate hornet nests quickly while minimizing risk to people and pets, all at transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Edison's mix of residential neighborhoods, shopping centers like Menlo Park Mall, and industrial parks along Route 1 and the New Jersey Turnpike creates numerous opportunities for hornets to nest in protected spaces. The township's tree-lined streets, proximity to parks like Roosevelt Park, and suburban architecture with dormers and overhangs make properties particularly vulnerable to hornet colonization during spring and summer.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in Edison typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size and location of the nest, accessibility, and the extent of the infestation. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees after inspecting your property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Edison?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Edison locations. Once on-site, our technicians can typically remove a hornet nest within 1-2 hours, though larger or harder-to-reach nests may require additional time for safe elimination.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal process prioritizes safety for your household. We use targeted treatments and professional protective equipment to eliminate hornets while minimizing exposure to people and pets. We'll provide specific instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than most wasps and yellow jackets, with some species reaching up to 2 inches long. They build large, enclosed paper nests typically in trees or under eaves, while yellow jackets often nest in ground cavities or wall voids. Hornets are generally more aggressive when defending their nests and require professional removal for safety.
